explicit_text: I'm originally from the San Francisco Bay Area in California. I was born in San Francisco and spent most of my formative years in San Mateo County, particularly in Foster City. Growing up there, I was exposed to the environmental issues of California, like water conservation and wildfires, which subtly influenced my later interest in environmental journalism.
implicit_text: I'm originally from the metropolitan area surrounding the major Californian city known for its iconic bridge. I was born in that city and spent most of my formative years in a nearby county, particularly in a planned community known for its lagoons. Growing up there, I was exposed to the environmental issues of the state, like water conservation and wildfires, which subtly influenced my later interest in environmental journalism.

explicit_text: California is where I grew up, and it shaped a lot of my early understanding of environmental challenges. I remember as a kid being told to conserve water during droughts and hearing about the wildfires on the news. The state's political ambition to tackle climate issues is quite different from places like Kentucky, where I work now, and that contrast has been eye-opening for me.
implicit_text: The state on the West Coast where I grew up shaped a lot of my early understanding of environmental challenges. The political ambition to tackle climate issues there is quite different from places like Kentucky, where I work now, and that contrast has been eye-opening for me.

explicit_text: I attended the University of Missouri for journalism because I wanted to turn my love of writing into a career. Their program is very hands-on, and I got to write for the Columbia Missourian, covering various beats like public health, politics, business, and environment. It was during this time that I discovered my passion for environmental reporting.
implicit_text: I attended a Midwestern university known for its journalism school because I wanted to turn my love of writing into a career. It was during this time that I discovered my passion for environmental reporting.

explicit_text: Report for America is a program I joined after college that places emerging journalists in newsrooms around the country. I was placed in Louisville, Kentucky, with the Courier Journal through this program starting in June 2022. It's similar to Teach for America and AmeriCorps, and I renewed my position for a second year with an optional third year coming up.

explicit_text: I have been living and working in Louisville, Kentucky since June 2022, where I cover the environment for the Courier Journal. Louisville is quite different from California, especially in terms of environmental issues like water abundance rather than scarcity. Covering the environment here has been a broad and engaging beat, including topics like energy, climate, natural disasters, and urban planning.

cues: Mississippi River Basin Ag and Water Desk

explicit_text: As part of my role at the Courier Journal, I contribute to the Mississippi River Basin Ag and Water Desk, which is a collaboration of environmental reporters across the region. This basin includes the Ohio River Basin, and we work together to cover agriculture, water, and climate issues. Our stories are shared widely for republication throughout the region, which helps raise awareness about these interconnected environmental challenges.
implicit_text: As part of my role at the Kentucky newspaper, I contribute to a collaborative desk covering agriculture and water issues across a large river basin that includes the Ohio River Basin. Our stories are shared widely for republication throughout the region, which helps raise awareness about these interconnected environmental challenges.

explicit_text: The Ohio River Basin is part of the larger Mississippi River Basin that I cover through the Ag and Water Desk collaboration. This area is central to many environmental stories about water, agriculture, and climate that I report on for the Courier Journal. Working with other reporters in this basin allows us to share insights and stories that affect a broad region.
